Data Deletion Policy

The Organization LLC — Effective March 14, 2026

Your Right to Data Deletion

You have the right to request deletion of your personal data from our systems at any time. This includes data collected through our website, Telegram bot, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram, and any other communication channel.

How to Request Data Deletion

Option 1 — Email: Send a request to privacy@ziarem.com with the subject "Data Deletion Request"

Option 2 — Phone: Call (305) 988-9666

Option 3 — Telegram: Message @Ziarem_bot with "Delete my data"

Option 4 — WhatsApp/Messenger/Instagram: Send us a message requesting data deletion through any of these channels

What We Delete

  • Contact information (name, email, phone, address)
  • Communication history (messages, chat logs)
  • Quote requests and service inquiries
  • Account preferences and settings
  • Any files or documents you uploaded

What We May Retain

Certain data may be retained as required by law:

  • Financial records: Mortgage, insurance, and tax records as required by federal/state regulations (RESPA, IRS requirements)
  • Compliance records: Anti-money laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) documentation
  • Legal obligations: Records required for pending or potential legal proceedings

Processing Timeline

Data deletion requests are processed within 30 days. You will receive confirmation once your data has been removed from our active systems. Backup systems may take up to 90 days to fully purge.

Facebook & Instagram Data

If you connected with us through Facebook or Instagram, we will delete all data obtained through those platforms upon request. You can also manage your data directly through Facebook App Settings.

Contact

  • Phone: (305) 988-9666
  • Email: privacy@ziarem.com
© 2026 The Organization LLC. All rights reserved.
